intro: 老任這次瘋了！Switch 2 竟然要出《時之笛》重製版，還有《異度神劍》全新續作！
main_content: 除了神作復活，異度神劍全系列還集體4K高清重置，外加新內容直接香爆，荷包真的要歸零啦！
outro: 留言區戰起來！你最想玩哪款？記得訂閱小花，情報不漏接喔！
visual_prompts: 2D anime style, visually stunning, a next-generation handheld gaming console Switch 2 displaying a beautiful legendary fantasy kingdom with a glowing master sword, magical particles, epic gaming reveal vibe, No text, no letters, no words

2D anime style, visually stunning, an excited male anime gamer geek sitting in front of gaming monitors, holding a handheld console with glowing eyes of pure excitement, vibrant colors, comic expression, No text, no letters, no words

news_sources.title: 任天堂Switch 2重量級大作連發！薩爾達時之笛重製與異度神劍新作震撼登場
